faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Millburn, NJ?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Millburn typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method chosen. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, and offer flexible payment plans for Millburn residents.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in Millburn homes?
faqs.answer: Heat treatment can eliminate bed bugs in 6-8 hours in a single visit, while chemical treatments typically require 2-3 applications spaced 2-3 weeks apart. We work efficiently to minimize disruption to your daily routine and can schedule treatments around your availability, including evenings and weekends.

faqs.question: Are bed bug treatments safe for my family and pets in Millburn?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for families and pets when applied by our certified technicians.
